overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene showing a hooded character standing on a rocky mountain overlook during golden hour, gazing at a vast landscape of snow-capped peaks, a distant lake, and layered mountain ranges under a dramatic partly cloudy sky.

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky from left to right
additional birds fly overhead in the distance

notable_agents.action: flock of birds flying across the sky in the distance

entered.detail: tall mountain with snow-covered summit dominating the background, backlit by golden sun
calm body of water visible in the valley between mountain ranges
stone outcrop where the character stands, overlooking the valley below
weathered wooden post or ruin fragment on the left side of the frame
dense tree coverage filling the valley floor between the cliff and the mountains

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a breathtaking mountain vista during golden hour. Snow-capped peaks rise in the distance above a forested valley and a calm lake, while birds occasionally fly across the dramatic cloudy sky. The scene remains largely static, emphasizing the scale and beauty of the natural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, cinematic gaze from a rocky precipice that emphasizes the immense scale of a mountain wilderness during the golden hour. It begins with a hooded character standing still on the cliff's edge, overlooking a vast vista of snow-capped peaks and a forested valley. As the camera lingers, the focus expands to encompass a calm lake nestled below the towering ranges under a dramatic, cloudy sky. The scene remains poised and atmospheric, punctuated only by the occasional flight of birds crossing the horizon before the view settles into a final, breathtaking panorama of the natural landscape.
